biography: Riku, brother of the well-known Panu, is a familiar face to many who follow the Hector Trophée. Known for his calm and collected demeanor on the course, Riku has a reputation for being a steady player, someone who rarely makes mistakes but perhaps lacks the spark for the truly exceptional.
While Riku has only participated in the Hector Trophée once, his presence is always felt. He is known to spend a lot of time with his brother Panu at the course.
Although officially considered retired from Hector Trophée events, fans know that a player of Riku's caliber could always make a comeback. For now, we will have to wait and see.
